title: orthopogon retzii
intro: Orthopogon retzii, also known as East Indian lemongrass, is a type of plant native to the tropical regions of India and Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Orthopogon retzii include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and aid in the relief of menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Orthopogon retzii can be prepared as an essential oil, tea, or tincture, and is often used in aromatherapy and herbal remedies due to its citrusy and invigorating scent.
